title: NEIGHBORHOOD HOUSING AND CARE PROGRAM - 211info
text: OUR HOUSE NEIGHBORHOOD HOUSING AND CARE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-home support like nursing, therapy, and social work. Helps with health checkups, understanding and taking medicines, and getting support for daily and household tasks. Assists with housing needs, connects people with community resources, and offers counseling and social support. Also teaches life and coping skills and checks home safety. 2727 SE Alder Street Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Individuals diagnosed with HIV Hours: No standard hours Email (971) 346-3851 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (971) 346-3851 Coordinator Alternate (503) 887-5400 Our House Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Clients can self-refer or be referred by community providers. Referral form is available online. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Requested medical records AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 15. Stop at SE 26th and Belmont Street is 3 blocks away. Services: Case/Care Management * AIDS/HIV Issues Life Skills Education * AIDS/HIV Specialized Information and Referral * AIDS/HIV Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OUR HOUSE RESIDENTIAL CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OUR HOUSE
